content.en:
"Even the third realm was hunted down, and the secrets involved were not simple!"

Ye Tian was reluctant to be involved, even if he really found the third realm, he didn't dare to report it.

Who knows what the secret behind it is, maybe after the report, it will be extinguished afterwards!

After all, once the secrets involved are enough for him, the other party will think that he may know, and it is normal to kill him.

For Yandu Heavenly Pavilion, it was simply too easy to let a second realm fall silently.

"You can't get involved in this matter!"

Ye Tian said secretly in his heart.

Of course.

There are also smart second realms who dare not participate, but there are also dreams of obtaining the second realm of Yandu Heavenly Pavilion, for them, this is also a big opportunity, maybe there is hope to rely on this opportunity to impact the third realm!

So, a little bit of risk is nothing to them.

But Ye Tian is 100% sure of breaking through to the third realm, and he has a lot of secrets, so he naturally won't take a little risk.

......

After the grand meeting of the six capitals, a group of extradimensional realms left.

And Ye Tian also left.

After going back.

Ye Tian used the Eternal Essence to improve his cultivation.

A bottle of Eternal Essence isn't much, but it has a lot of effects.

Ye Tian refined drops of Eternal Essence, and the majestic energy continued to refine his cultivation, making the cultivation that had been almost imperceptible to progress over 570 years have made significant progress.

However, just a bottle of Eternal Essence would not have allowed his cultivation to directly enter the middle stage of the Second Realm.

Unless his cultivation had reached the limit of the early stage of the second realm, he could hope to use the Eternal Essence to break the shackles of cultivation and be promoted to the middle stage of the second realm.

But he had only recently entered the early stage of the Second Realm, and his cultivation was still far from the middle stage of the Second Realm!

After a few extradimensional eras, Ye Tian ran out of this bottle of Eternal Essence.

"It's a pity, the cultivation is still in the early stage of the second realm, but it is not far from the middle of the second realm, if there are five or six more bottles of eternal essence, you can definitely break through to the middle stage of the second realm!"

However, it was luck for him to obtain this bottle of Eternal Essence, and if he wanted to obtain five or six more bottles of Eternal Essence, even if he participated in the Ten Enlightenment Six Capital Events, he might not be able to meet them.

And just like that, another period of time passed.

During this period, the matter of Yandu Heavenly Pavilion chasing and killing the third realm of the transcendent realm gradually spread among the transcendent realms, and many extradimensional realms were secretly looking for the injured third realm, but they did not dare to look for it on a large scale.

But it has also made many secluded extradimensional (CGBB) realms discovered, after all, any secluded extradimensional realm of unknown origin may be the injured third realm, which leads to many secluded extradimensional realms being suspected, resulting in conflicts.

As a result, many extradimensional realm battles broke out, causing more than ten extradimensional realms to fall due to the battle.

No matter how chaotic the outside world is, Ye Tian is very low-key and never participates.

Over the years, he had been collecting materials that could refine a medium-sized extradimensional weapon, but he couldn't collect them all for a while.

In addition, he is also collecting and refining the second realm's extradimensional spirit puppets.

If you can refine a spirit puppet whose strength is comparable to that of the second realm, it will also be very helpful to yourself.

this day.

The summons from the Liudu Boundary Mountain came, asking him to guard the Liudu Boundary Wall.

"It's only been more than ten extradimensional eras, and the Liudu Boundary Mountain has come to inform me that it has passed, it seems that guarding the Liudu Boundary Wall really needs manpower!"

Ye Tian went over directly.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the Liudu Boundary Mountain, and a second realm superdimensional realm of the Liudu Boundary Mountain took Ye Tian to the Liudu Boundary Wall.

There are a total of six sealing nodes on the Liudu Boundary Wall, and he only needs to guard one of the sealing nodes.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, for the next hundred extradimensional eras, you only need to guard here. "

This sealing node is surrounded by the power of the formation, and there are endless formation barriers not far away, and beyond the formation barrier, there is a vast void, and that void should be the place where the sealed extradimensional race lives.

In the dark, he seemed to see the breath of a group of extradimensional races, but due to the barrier of the formation, he couldn't see it clearly.

And at this node, there are mansions one after another, and Ye Tian chose one mansion to live in.

Of course, he also received some detailed information about the Liudu Boundary Mountain.

He guards here, not only does he stay here to practice all the time, but he is also very busy, for example, those extra-dimensional races will impact the formation from time to time, and the second realm of these towns needs to control a part of the formation to attack these super-dimensional races, and he also needs to patrol this sealing array from time to time, if there is a little problem, he needs to report it at all times, so that there will be super-powerful people who are good at sealing the formation. []

At the beginning of guarding the boundary wall of the six capitals, it was very calm here.

But not long after, those extradimensional creatures came to attack the walls of the six capitals.

Thundered!!!

A large number of extra-dimensional creatures attacked, many of which existed in the second realm, and there were even some extra-dimensional creatures whose physical bodies were extremely terrifying, as if they could rival the second realm by relying on their physical bodies.

"It's the third realm of sealed strength!!!

Ye Tian was shocked.

This was the second time he had seen the existence of the third realm, unlike the sealed Tricky Wood Red Dragon, these third realms had the ability to move, but their strength was sealed even worse, and only the cultivation of the second realm remained.

And although the Tricky Wood Red Dragon is sealed and cannot move, it can exert the attack power of the third realm.

This should be the result of different sealing methods.

"All the second realms control the formation nodes they are responsible for and intercept these extradimensional creatures!"

A voice resounded through the node.

"Yes!"

The second realm has urged the formation.

Ye Tian had already obtained a token, which could control a part of the formation.

In an instant, his will was connected with the formation, and he manipulated the power of the formation, forming a huge formation figure, like a huge giant, fighting with these extradimensional creatures.

Now.

Ye Tian seemed to be truly fighting against these extra-dimensional creatures, and the strength of his body far exceeded his own, and he could probably exert his strength beyond the peak of the second realm, and he could also control the extradimensional rules.

However, fighting in this way consumes a lot of cultivation and willpower, and even causes a certain burden on one's body.

It is difficult to fight for a long time in the second realm, but as long as these extradimensional creatures are repelled, they can rest.

"No wonder you need to keep recruiting the second realm, if it's just the second realm of the Six Capital Realm Mountains, where can you hold on!"

Ye Tian retracted his thoughts and continued to manipulate the formation body to fight, trying to repel these extradimensional creatures.

And he also knows the origin of these extradimensional creatures, this extradimensional creature race is the Annihilation Blood Tiger Race.
